title: artemisia oelandica
intro: Artemisia oelandica, also known as Oeland Artemisia or Oeland Sage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Baltic island of Öland in Sweden. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like camphor, borneol, and thujone, that have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia oelandica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in aromatherapy, to harness its medicinal properties.
